task_name: CodePen HTML PPT-style output generation (tighter spec)
goal: Generate a single self-contained HTML PPT-style page from CodePen inspiration with strict structure, measurable balance, and readability-safe visual effects.
constraints: Output must be a single standalone HTML document with embedded CSS and optional minimal JS only for transitions.
Include exactly 6 slide-like sections: cover, agenda, three content sections, and summary.
Each section must contain one heading and 3-5 bullet points; total words per section 40-90.
Use semantic HTML tags (main/section/h1-h3/ul/li/footer) and maintain consistent class naming.
Use a 16:9 slide canvas layout optimized for 1366x768 viewport.
Visual effects allowed: subtle gradients, shadows, fade/slide transitions under 500ms; no autoplay motion loops.
Maintain WCAG-like readability: contrast ratio target >= 4.5:1 for body text, avoid low-opacity body text.
Do not require login, API keys, external assets that can break offline rendering.

fields.name: html_file
fields.description: Final standalone HTML string/file containing all sections and styles.

fields.name: section_outline
fields.description: Ordered list of 6 section titles and bullet counts per section.

fields.name: balance_metrics
fields.description: Per-section word counts and confirmation each section is within 40-90 words.

fields.name: visual_effects
fields.description: List applied effects with durations and readability safeguards.
